Hello,

How are you pulling money from the business if it has no money?

Ashley Glass
Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
503-802-8315
[Logo  Description automatically generated]

If you need to report any household or income changes, you can download documents from the participant portal at
https://portal.homeforward.org/Forms/Participant

You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service window.
The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM – noon and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street

From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, April 1, 2026 10:24 AM
To: Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
Subject: Re: Additional Information Needed


🛑  CAUTION: This email is NOT from a Home Forward email address. Do NOT click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe. Home Forward does NOT have a "Safe Sender" list. :CAUTION  🛑
I personally spend money from the business, but the business itself has no customers, there is no income. Everything that I spend becomes free and open source software.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Free_and_open-source_software

On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:23 AM Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org<mailto:Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>> wrote:
Hello,

You said you get $900.00 a month, is that no longer the case?

Ashley Glass
Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
503-802-8315
[Logo    Description automatically generated]

The business has no income, my business partner in Germany Marc Emmanuel Otto, has cancer and is just spending his own money, because he cant take it with him.

On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:02 AM Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org<mailto:Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>> wrote:
Hello,

I understand getting 3 part verification for income is difficult when it is your own/co-owned business. I am going to attach a new income from a business form and on there is where you can list the income you receive from the business monthly.

Ashley Glass
Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
503-802-8315
